meta.notes: Audited via cursor-ide-browser snapshot and full-page screenshot. Playwright extract-tokens unavailable (Playwright not installed).

brand.name: basement.studio
brand.tagline: We make cool shit that performs.
brand.personality: High-end digital studio merging 3D craft with engineering discipline; confident tone with profanity-adjacent copy used intentionally.

primary.usage: Primary headlines and logo on dark backgrounds

background.usage: Page and section backgrounds; near-pure black

foreground.usage: Body and headline text on dark

accent.usage: Warm orange from 3D scene lighting and arcade glow

spacing.containerMaxWidth: full-bleed sections with padded text blocks
spacing.sectionPadding: Large vertical rhythm; hero 3D full viewport

components.navigation: Minimal fixed header: logo left, hamburger Menu right, transparent over 3D hero
components.buttons: Text buttons (Contact Us, Turn music on); high contrast white on dark
components.cards: Featured project blocks with image/video and case study copy
components.footer: Multi-column links, newsletter CTA, social icons, copyright
observedPatterns: Featured projects with client names as links

contrastIssues: Low-light 3D scene may reduce perceived contrast for decorative content
accessibility.landmarkStructure: document with headings h1-h4; navigation via header links and footer list
accessibility.keyboardNavNotes: Interactive buttons labeled (Go to homepage, Open menu, Contact Us); verify focus visibility over 3D canvas

techSignals.framework: Next.js (inferred from studio stack and Vercel partnership)
